member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.IPublisher
member.summary: Message publisher that publishes messages to the subscribers.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.IPublisher.TryEnqueue(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Enqueues the message to be published to the subscribers.

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.IQueueFactory
member.summary: Factory to create queue publishers and subscribers.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.IQueueFactory.CreatePublisher(Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueOptions)
member.summary: Creates a queue message publisher.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.IQueueFactory.CreateSubscriber(Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueOptions)
member.summary: Creates a queue message subscriber.

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ISubscriber
member.summary: Message subscriber that subscribes to the messages published by the publisher.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ISubscriber.TryDequeue(System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte}@)
member.summary: Dequeues a message from the queue if the queue is not empty. This is a non-blocking call and returns immediately. This overload allocates a array the size of the message in the queue and copies the message from the shared memory to it. To avoid this memory allocation, consider reusing a previously allocated array with . can be a good way of pooling and reusing byte arrays.
member.param: A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
The dequeued message.
member.returns: Returns if the queue is empty.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ISubscriber.TryDequeue(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte}@)
member.summary: Dequeues a message from the queue if the queue is not empty. This is a non-blocking call and returns immediately. This method does not allocated memory and only populates the that is passed in. Make sure that the buffer is large enough to receive the entire message, or the message is truncated to fit the buffer.
member.param: The memory buffer that is populated with the message. Make sure that the buffer is large enough to receive the entire message, or the message is truncated to fit the buffer.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
The dequeued message.
member.returns: Returns if the queue is empty.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ISubscriber.Dequeue(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dequeues a message from the queue. If the queue is empty, it *waits* for the arrival of a new message. This call is blocking until a message is received. This overload allocates a array the size of the message in the queue and copies the message from the shared memory to it. To avoid this memory allocation, consider reusing a previously allocated array with . can be a good way of pooling and reusing byte arrays.
member.param: A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ISubscriber.Dequeue(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dequeues a message from the queue. If the queue is empty, it *waits* for the arrival of a new message. This call is blocking until a message is received. This method does not allocated memory and only populates the that is passed in. Make sure that the buffer is large enough to receive the entire message, or the message is truncated to fit the buffer.
member.param: The memory buffer that is populated with the message. Make sure that the buffer is large enough to receive the entire message, or the message is truncated to fit the buffer.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions
member.summary: The options to create a raw memory view.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique name of the memory view.
The maximum capacity of the memory view in bytes. This should be at least 16 bytes long and in the multiples of 8

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique name of the queue.
The path to the directory/folder in which the memory mapped and other files are stored in
The maximum capacity of the queue in bytes. This should be at least 16 bytes long and in the multiples of 8

member.name: P:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions.MemoryViewName
member.summary: Gets the unique name of the memory view.

member.name: P:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions.Path
member.summary: Gets the path to the directory/folder in which the memory mapped and other files are stored in.

member.name: P:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions.Capacity
member.summary: Gets the size of the memory view in bytes.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.MemoryViewOptions.GetActualStorageSize
member.summary: Gets the full size of this memory view. For raw memory view this is the same as Capacity.

member.name: F:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueHeader.ReadOffset
member.summary: Where the next message could potentially be read

member.name: F:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueHeader.WriteOffset
member.summary: Where the next message could potentially be written

member.name: F:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueHeader.ReadLockTimestamp
member.summary: Time (ticks) at which the read lock was taken. It is set to zero if not lock

member.name: F:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueHeader.Reserved
member.summary: Not used and might be used in the future

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueOptions
member.summary: The options to create a queue.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique name of the queue.
The maximum capacity of the queue in bytes. This should be at least 16 bytes long and in the multiples of 8

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique name of the queue.
The path to the directory/folder in which the memory mapped and other files are stored in
The maximum capacity of the queue in bytes. This should be at least 16 bytes long and in the multiples of 8

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueOptions.GetActualStorageSize
member.summary: Gets the full size of the queue that includes both the header and message sections

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.Memory.Unix.AtomicFileCounter
member.summary:
Uses interlocked operations on a memory-mapped file to count how many references to it exist.
Each instantiation of this class on the same file path will increment it's count by one,
and each disposal will decrease the count by one.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.Memory.Unix.AtomicFileCounter.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{System.String},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Creates a new atomic file counter at the specified path.
member.param: The path to the file counter.
Callback to invoke when the atomic file counter reaches zero.
The count on the file at the time of instantiation.

member.name: P:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.Memory.Unix.AtomicFileCounter.FileValue
member.summary: How many references to this file currently exist.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.Memory.Unix.AtomicFileCounter.Dispose
member.summary: Decrements the atomic counter by one and disposes of the memory map.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.Queue.GetPaddedMessageLength(System.Int64)
member.summary:
Calculates the total length of a message which consists of [header][body][padding].
headerAn instance of
bodyA collection of bytes provided by the user
paddingA possible padding is added to round up the length to the closest multiple of 8 bytes

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.QueueFactory.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.InterprocessSemaphore
member.summary: This class opens or creates platform agnostic named semaphore. Named semaphores are synchronization constructs accessible across processes.

member.name: T:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to the to register the shared-memory queue.

member.name: M:Cloudtoid.Interprocess.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddInterprocessQueue(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers what is needed to create and consume shared-memory queues that are cross-process accessible. Use to access the queue.
